hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer & UX/UI Designer. I build scalable, intuitive digital products with real impact.

shortAbout.title: A bit about me
shortAbout.desc: I am a Full Stack Developer and UX/UI Design Student dedicated to building robust and memorable digital tools. I actively leverage Artificial Intelligence in my workflows to accelerate development and maintain flawless code. I prioritize server-side scalability while designing interfaces that end-users actually enjoy using.

ux.title: UX/UI Focus
ux.desc: Every line of code I write has the user in mind. I design intuitive, accessible, and efficient interfaces that solve real problems.

soft.title: Collaborative Mindset
soft.desc: I believe in assertive communication and teamwork as pillars of success. I adapt quickly to new challenges, bringing proactivity and practical solutions to the project.

fullstack.title: Full Stack Vision
fullstack.desc: From wireframe to deploy. I handle the entire product lifecycle: design, frontend, backend, databases, and infrastructure.

about.p1: I'm Nicolás Ariel Fernández, a Full Stack Developer and UX/UI Design Student, with over 3 years of software development experience.
about.p2: My main focus is developing efficient web applications using modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript. In parallel, my training in UX/UI Design gives me a user-centered vision, allowing me to design interfaces that not only look amazing but are highly functional, intuitive, and accessible.
about.p3: I consider myself a proactive professional, detail-oriented, and always ready to learn new industry tools. I enjoy working in teams and being involved in the entire product lifecycle: from visual conceptualization to the final code in production.

card1.title: 3+ years of experience
card1.desc: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and modern architectures.

card2.title: UX/UI Design Focus
card2.desc: Creating intuitive interfaces and user-centered experiences.

card3.title: Continuous Learning
card3.desc: Proactivity, adaptability, and passion for technical best practices.

jobs.desc: I work with a wide range of clients to help turn their ideas into solid, functional web applications. From the early stages, I support them in shaping a realistic development plan—breaking down ideas into smaller, actionable steps and moving forward through modular iterations. Day to day, I’m building and maintaining full-stack solutions, from UI design and frontend development to backend APIs and deployment pipelines. I enjoy collaborating closely with clients, writing clean and maintainable code.
jobs.tech: React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Laravel, Docker, Git, AWS

jobs.desc: Developed web applications using full-stack technologies, including backend services with Ruby on Rails and frontend frameworks like React.js, working closely with cross-functional teams.
jobs.tech: AWS, Ruby on Rails, Python, JavaScript, Node.js, React.js, Teamwork

jobs.role: International Career in Gastronomy and Hospitality
jobs.desc: Professional Chef and Team Leader: Successful development of a career in Culinary Arts working in fast-paced professional kitchens in Australia, New Zealand, Sweden, and Germany. Development of high-performance work habits transferable to software development: strict time management, attention to detail, adaptability to new environments, and ability to execute complex workflows under pressure.
jobs.tech: Leadership, Working under pressure, Multicultural adaptability, Time management

jobs.desc: Designed and developed websites for clients across various industries, gathering client requirements and delivering projects on time.
jobs.tech: SQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, AngularJS, jQuery, PHP (Laravel)

jobs.desc: Developed Android applications and web platforms, working with cross-functional teams and ensuring seamless user experiences.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Learn a bit more about how I work and how I can help you.

questions.q: What does your typical work process look like?
questions.a: My process is divided into 4 main phases: 1. Discovery: Fully understanding your needs and the product's objective. 2. Design & Planning: Defining the architecture, UX/UI design, and breaking the project into clear stages. 3. Modular Development: Iteratively building the project, delivering functional versions in short cycles. 4. Delivery & Maintenance: Production deployment with clean, scalable, and SEO-optimized code.

questions.q: What kind of projects can you help me with?
questions.a: With a Full Stack profile and UX/UI design skills, I can help you from scratch: interface design (Figma), attractive and accessible visual development (Frontend), and implementing business logic, databases, and server deployment (Backend & DevOps). Ideal for MVPs (Minimum Viable Products), custom web platforms, e-commerce, and internal systems.

Transparency: Clear communication about deadlines and technical feasibility. Quality over speed: I prefer writing maintainable and secure code rather than taking quick shortcuts. Empathy: Always putting the final user at the center of the product. Responsibility: If a problem arises, I take ownership and look for the solution immediately.

questions.q: What did your culinary career bring to software development?
questions.a: At first glance, they seem worlds apart, but they share the same operational foundation: the need to communicate efficiently under high pressure, impeccable time management, knowing how to prioritize critical tasks, and never losing your cool when the unexpected happens. It has given me an extreme resilience and adaptability that I consider my greatest professional edge.

questions.q: How do you integrate Artificial Intelligence (AI) into your workflow?
questions.a: I use AI (such as ChatGPT, Claude, or Copilots) as a constant productivity accelerator. Far from replacing technical judgment, it allows me to automate repetitive tasks, debug code faster, build prototypes in record time, and research efficient architectural solutions. By delegating mechanical writing to AI, I invest more energy in the user experience and the structural quality of the application.
